name: Fortive Corp
summary: PART I General Fortive Corporation innovates essential technologies to keep our world safe and productive. Our strategic segments - Intelligent Operating Solutions and Advanced Healthcare Solutions - include iconic inventor brands with leading positions in their markets. Our businesses design, develop, manufacture, and market products, software, and services, building upon leading brand names, innovative technologies, and strong market positions.
